title: Nio Q2 2024 Earnings Results
text: Revenue generation reached RMB 17.446 billion ($2.4 billion) on September 5, 2024, surpassing Wall Street's expectation of RMB 17.385 billion and exceeding guidance range of RMB 16.59-17.14 billion. Vehicle deliveries achieved record 57,373 vehicles, exceeding guidance of 54,000-56,000 units and representing 144% year-over-year growth and 91% sequential growth from Q1. Net loss narrowed to RMB 5.05 billion, down 16.7% annually. Adjusted net loss reached RMB 4.54 billion, below analysts' expectations of RMB 4.9 billion. Gross margin improved to 9.7%, highest since Q3 2022 and exceeding analyst estimates of 8.736%. Vehicle margin climbed to 12.2% from 9.2% in Q1. Management projects Q3 deliveries of 61,000-63,000 units and revenue between RMB 19.11-19.67 billion, indicating modest growth of 0.2-3.2% year-over-year. CFO noted company will continue to adopt flexible market strategies and optimize product portfolio.
